subject: [PATCH v1 08/17] fuse: add passthrough ops gating

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds passthrough operation gating to the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module. It introduces a check to verify whether passthrough operations can be called for a specific file or not, based on the FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO mode being enabled. This preserves backwards compatibility with prior passthrough behavior and ensures that the correct path is taken when accessing files. The patch modifies several existing callers in the FUSE codebase to route through this new check, allowing for more controlled and secure handling of passthrough operations.
